Rewards for Excellence

UGIP Nainital deeply values hard work and merit. We encourage our students to push their boundaries through various institutional rewards:

  • Annual Merit ScholarshipFinancial aid granted to the top 3 rankers of every department.
  • The Principal’s MedalA gold medal awarded to the overall institute topper.
  • Priority PlacementToppers get priority slots in campus recruitment drives.

Aim for the Top!

"Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts." We encourage every student at UGIP to utilize our modern labs and library to their fullest potential to join this Hall of Fame.

Visit Library Resources
